HeroHeader.WhatIDo: Building modern web and desktop applications for growing businesses.

ApplicationDevelopment.Title: Custom Application Development
ApplicationDevelopment.Description: Build secure, scalable web and desktop applications tailored to your business requirements, from planning to deployment.

UserInterfaceDesign.Title: Interfaces Users Enjoy Using
UserInterfaceDesign.Description: Design intuitive interfaces that make your product easier to use and increase user engagement.

BackendDevelopment.Title: Reliable Backend Systems
BackendDevelopment.Description: Develop secure backend systems and APIs that keep your application reliable, scalable, and easy to maintain.

OptimizationConsulting.Title: Make Your Product Faster
OptimizationConsulting.Description: Improve your application's speed, security, architecture, and overall performance.

Services.Solutions: From the initial idea to a ready-to-use product
Services.HowCanIHelpYou: Every project is different. I help you choose the right solution and deliver your product from design to deployment.

Medad.Title: Medad System
Medad.Description: A complete platform for school management with advanced features for attendance, reporting, student and teacher management, informing parents of their child's presence and absence at school with an SMS panel. The ability to communicate seamlessly between personnel in the system in an integrated manner to provide information and reduce costs.
Medad.ImageAlt: تصویر مدیریت کلاس در سامانه مداد

SingoLearn.Title: Singo Learn
SingoLearn.Description: Programming education website, ability to create courses, create chapters for courses, and manage teachers and students through the admin panel. Each student and teacher has a management dashboard built in, depending on their role.
SingoLearn.ImageAlt: تصویر صفحه اصلی وبسایت سینگو لرن

RestaurantPro.Title: Restaurant Pro
RestaurantPro.Description: A cloud-based multi-branch restaurant management platform designed to centralize branch operations, user management, inventory, orders, sales, and financial reporting. The system provides role-based access for administrators, branch managers, and cashiers while offering analytical dashboards, cloud synchronization, POS integration, and streamlined workflows for enterprise restaurant chains.
RestaurantPro.ImageAlt: Dashboard of a multi-branch restaurant management system

Tashim.Title: Tashim System
Tashim.Description: An enterprise ERP solution for project financial management and cost accounting, designed to calculate project cost, profitability, and financial performance. The platform supports project and contract management, cost centers, timesheets, budgeting, accounts receivable, and intelligent overhead allocation while providing executive dashboards and analytical reports for data-driven decision making.
Tashim.ImageAlt: Dashboard of a Project Costing ERP system

Tools.Solutions: I create the best solutions with the best tools.

ColaborationProcess.ColaborationDescription: We are with you from idea to product.

1.Title: Consultation & Analysis
1.Description: Reviewing your idea and business, analyzing requirements, and providing solutions

2.Title: Design & Planning
2.Description: UI/UX design, creating a timeline, and planning for project completion

3.Title: Development & Implementation
3.Description: Coding and implementation, testing, and ensuring the website/software functions correctly

4.Title: Delivery & Support
4.Description: Project delivery, training for usage, and free support

1.name: Ali Rezaei
1.content: We turned to him to design a management panel for our internal projects. Despite its complexity, he delivered the system in a way that was easy for everyone on the team to use.

2.name: Sara Mohammadi
2.content: We were looking for a meticulous developer to implement our store designs. He not only coded the designs without the slightest deviation, but also made some practical suggestions to improve speed and user experience that really made a positive impact on the final output.

3.name: Reza Karimi
3.content: He is a very experienced, professional, caring and very sensitive person. He made excellent suggestions to advance the project, met our needs and gained our full confidence for future cooperation.

4.name: Zahra Ahmadi
4.content: At first, I was skeptical about choosing them, but they completed the project in the best possible way and in the shortest possible time. Their responsiveness is excellent and they quickly fixed any issues I had. The fact that they have both WordPress knowledge and coding knowledge made the result very good. Looking forward to working with them again.

5.name: Mohammad Rahimi
5.content: Mr. Gholami is very punctual, very fast, very ethical, professional, I am completely satisfied with him. I would be happy to work with him again.

6.name: Negar Hosseini
6.content: Their work is completely correct, they are both ethical and know their job, they carry out the work without any hassle or worry. That's what's important to me. Hoping for more cooperation.

7.name: Amir Hosseini
7.content: We needed a thorough technical review before investing in a startup. His report was so comprehensive and fair that it made our decision-making process completely transparent. His professionalism was evident throughout the entire process.

8.name: Maryam Goodarzi
8.content: I chose them out of all the freelancers because they are very respectful, friendly, and professional. But I will definitely be defining the next project for them. My suggestion is to trust them, you won't regret it.

fullName.min: Full name must be at least 3 characters

phoneNumber.invalid: Invalid phone number (must start with 09, 021, or 051 and have 11 digits)

title.min: Subject must be at least 5 characters

description.min: description must be at least 5 characters
